text: Creao AI profile: The Super Agent that delivers beyond the chat window. CREAO Runs It All. Discord discord.gg/creao-ai. Profile links creao.ai and a CREAO Builders community with 127 members.

Introducing CREAO: the Super Agent that delivers beyond the chat window. Describe what you need. CREAO builds it live. Save it as an agent. Run it on schedule. While you focus on what's next. Chat. Create. Run it all. #CreaoAI

The community events and builds sub-account is live. Creao invites users to see what others are creating, follow upcoming events, join contests, discover best practices, and get inspired. The quoted @CreaoBuilds launch promises creator-first spotlights, real demos, campaign submissions, and breakdowns of why things work.

LAHacks recap: Creao met builders, watched teams go from idea to working products in hours, and says seeing agents come to life in front of them is why they do this. Congratulates winners and teams that shipped over the weekend.

Creao distinguishes LLMs from agent systems. It says LLMs can write, summarize, translate, analyze, and reason, while an agent system uses the model plus tools, memory, files, runtime, scheduling, and triggers. It argues agents change the question from making one task faster to identifying recurring workflows that need work every time.

Creao highlights a user-built sports agent that tracks football schedules across top leagues, UCL, UEL, Euro, and World Cup, then posts a Telegram match preview every morning. The quoted builder says it was built with @CreaoAI, zero code, fully automated.
